name: Psyche
author: Brendan-McKeag
description: A roguelike emotional-roleplay engine. From an intentionally sparse character card, each new chat seeds a distinct hidden persona, so every run plays differently. Every non-player character is tracked with a live 40-dimension affect vector (38 emotions plus bipolar valence and mood) whose extremes are exponentially hard to reach, and a free-form character sheet the engine rewrites Claude Code-style after every turn. The current emotional state is injected into each reply so characters actually feel what has happened to them.
